lore.title: Lore
lore.subtitle: Let Yokoko tell you Banana-chan's secrets!
lore.q1.question: (Q1) What music does this game have?
lore.q1.answer: (A1) There are 2 songs: [Banana-chan's Theme] and [Banana-chan's Theme - Piano Version].
lore.q2.question: (Q2) Who made this game?
lore.q2.answer: (A2) Banana-chan made it. The BGM is by Uminyo Papa.
lore.q3.question: (Q3) Who is Banana-chan, anyway?
lore.q3.answer: (A3) Banana-chan is Banana-chan. For details, please check Uminyo's Splatoon Channel on YouTube.
lore.q4.question: (Q4) How long does one play take?
lore.q5.question: (Q5) Isn't this game too kusoge?
